title: Jananam 1947 Pranayam Thudarunnu
description:
The film tells the story of Gowri, an elderly woman residing in an old age home, who feels neglected as her son is unwilling to take her in. She has little to look forward to in life, until Shivan, the retirement home's caretaker, invites her to live with him. Their journey together evolves into a touching tale of companionship and love during their twilight years.

Gowri and Shivan come from different social backgrounds—Gowri is an educated teacher from an affluent family, while Shivan is an unrefined farmer. Despite these differences, their yearning for companionship connects them deeply. The film beautifully explores themes of love, isolation, and resilience in old age, enriched with soulful music by Govind Vasantha.

Their bond blossoms gradually, much like a newly married couple, and the film showcases warm moments that celebrate love in all its splendour. The supporting characters and village community are portrayed as welcoming and non-judgmental, adding richness to the narrative.

Directed, written, and produced by Abijith Asokan, Jananam 1947 Pranayam Thudarunnu﻿ is a sensitive and progressive story about finding love and hope late in life.

This synopsis captures the emotional core and cultural backdrop of the film appropriate for use in film profiles, festival entries, or distribution platforms.
cast:

title: Civilian
description:
Emrah (22) who has just been back from the military duty lives with
his mother. He does not talk to anybody, he just walks along highways
alone. Emrah keeps two letters in the drawer next to his bed. One of
these letters is the one he wrote to his ex-girlfriend, Sevgi, during
military service. The other is the one he found next to the guerrilla he
killed. Besides this letter, he found a notebook and a photo. Zeynep, the
woman on the photo, is the guerrilla's girlfriend. She learns from the TV
news about a few guerillas being killed. Emrah finds the building Zeynep
lives from the address on the letter. He leaves the letter, but he cannot
save himself from the nightmares. His uncle finds a night watch job at a
corporate building for Emrah. Obliged to stay in a small room the whole
night with a gun on his belt, Emrah, gets even more confused. He
watches the reruns of a marriage show that his mother used to watch in
the day time. One morning, his ex-girlfriend Sevgi, who is now married
to another man, calls him to meet. This meeting turns into a
confrontation for Emrah.
cast: Umut Sakallıoğlu , Pınar Göktaş , Münibe Millet, Meltem Savcı

title: Ali's Nature
description:
In a village where tradition and modernity; material and spiritual goes hand in hand, Ali is the last representative of the tradition in which the fish is regarded highly sacred, and when they die, they are buried with prayers in a special cemetery allocated for them.  Ali and his wife Meryem has only one problem, not being able to have a child. The young couple tries out both traditional and modern methods to be able to conceive. Kazım, another villager who has been treasure hunting during the nights disturbs Ali every now and then due to Kazım’s interest in Meryem that dates back to their younger age. Musa, a fresh university graduate, accompanies Kazım in his dream of finding the treasure.

While the tension between Meryem and Ali grows bigger, Kazım and Musa ruin the fish cemetery in their search for treasure.
cast: Algı Eke , Ozan Ayhan , Mehmet Usta, Meli Bendelli

title: PRANAYAM 1947
description: Telugu film

title: Bahumukham - Good, Bad & The Actor
description:
Genre: 
Suspense, Drama, Thriller 

Synopsis:
Everyone Wants To Be An Actor But How Far Would You Go?
Haunted by a dark past and fueled by his mother’s dream, a troubled young actor chases stardom while concealing chilling secrets. But as he sinks deeper into his role, the truth begins to surface and the line between redemption and destruction starts to blur.

Bahumukham has been well received by both audiences and critics across Telugu-speaking regions and the USA, earning an IMDb rating of 8.5 and a BookMyShow rating of 8.8, along with several regional ratings averaging 3 out of 5

Movie Trailer: https://youtu.be/BjoGMGD4ytI?si=k20NAZvf6Lo0Z1iG

Movie Teaser: https://youtu.be/R7sUMXQoApM?si=HgBLA8B3DOVN1gbU
cast: Harshiv Karthik, Swarnima Singh, Maria Martynova

title: Imran 3:185
description:
Shree is a debutant director, who is in the process of writing the script for his first movie. He stays in a rented house in the  city which he shares with two friends. Even though from different fields of work, all three get along well with each other  as well as the owners of their house.

Shree`s girlfriend Chippy is a regular at their house. Shree is unhappy with the pace at which his script Is progressing.  He had been working on it for a long time. One evening, when everyone was out, Shree comes home to find his childhood  friend Iype, waiting for him. As Shree had to move because of his dad’s job, he hadn’t seen Iype since both Were in 6th std.  Shree was ecstatic to see him after 18 long years. He gave him a warm hug and invited Him in. Shree couldn`t contain his excitement and couldn’t wait to hear about his news and the Purpose of this unexpected visit. Just as Iype began to talk, they were interrupted by someone Rushing in. The house owner’s eldest daughter had gone into labor and she needed  to be taken to the hospital immediately. Shree accompanies them to the hospital, asking Iype to wait for him at home.  By the time he returns the next morning after settling the affairs at the hospital, Iype is nowhere to be found.

Shree realizes that Iype left without telling him the reason for his visit. To his utter dismay, he discovers that he hadn’t  even asked for Iype’ s number. In his attempt to Find out about Iype he reaches out to his old friends and makes the  startling discovery that Iype had passed away under mysterious circumstances. Upon further enquiry, he realizes that  Iype’ s visit had been after his death. Shree`s mind was in turmoil thinking about why his friend had visited him after 18 long years, that too from the grave! Things that Iype left unsaid plagued his mind. He felt that the script that  was eluding him has finally sought him out.

He sets out on a quest to find answers to this mystery and to complete his script. He travels back to the happenings of  yesteryears along with his script to solve this puzzle of which he himself is a piece. Shree’s investigation into the demise  of Iype leads him on a journey he never imagined. He treads on the bridge between life and death to unearth the mystery.  He discovers that the reason was the result of a seemingly harmless deed they did in their childhood.
cast:
Adil Ibrahim
Parvathy Nambiar
Manikandan
Anjali Nair
Sudhi Koppa
Badusha
Appu

title: SHRI BALAJI PHOTO STUDIO
description:
PUTTU LIVES IN THE SMALL TOWN OF KAVALAKKI, WHICH IS NEAR HONNAVARA. HE OWNS A SMALL 
PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO WHICH WAS LEFT BEHIND BY HIS FATHER. PUTTU IS SURROUNDED BY TWO 
OF HIS CLOSE FRIENDS. ONE OF THEM IS SURESHA WHO IS AN INSURANCE AGENT. SURESHA WANTS 
TO GET MARRIED AT ANY COST, BUT HE ENDS UP BEING REJECTED BY EVERY SINGLE GIRL HE 
APPROACHES. THE OTHER FRIEND IS SUBBANNA WHO IS A MARRIAGE BROKER. 
SHANKAR HAKKIMANE IS THE MOST IMPORTANT MAN OF THE VILLAGE. EVERY SINGLE PERSON 
TREATS HIM WITH LOVE AND RESPECT. SHANKAR IS A GOOD MAN. BUT WHEN THINGS DON‟T GO HIS 
WAY, HE CAN BE EQUALLY VICIOUS. PUTTU HAS HUGE AMBITIONS FOR HIMSELF. HE WANTS TO 
SHOWCASE HIS CREATIVITY AND HIS CRAFTSMANSHIP THROUGH HIS PHOTOGRAPHY. BUT HE FINDS 
THIS TOWN TO BE TOO SMALL FOR HIS BIG DREAMS. PUTTU DECIDES TO TAKE A LOAN TO LEAVE 
TOWN BY MORTGAGING HIS PROPERTY. BUT HE FINDS OUT THAT HIS STUDIO HAS ALREADY BEEN 
MORTGAGED TO SHANKAR HAKKIMANE BY HIS FATHER. MEANWHILE, SHANKAR HAKKIMANE‟S 
SISTER NETHRA IS IN LOVE WITH PRADEEPA. THEIR RELATIONSHIP IS BROUGHT TO A STANDSTILL BY 
SHANKAR, WHO WANTS TO GET NETHRA MARRIED TO SOMEONE FROM THEIR OWN VILLAGE. 
THROUGH A SERIES OF EVENTS, SHANKAR HAKKIMANE APPROVES THE ENGAGEMENT OF SURESHA 
AND NETHRA. SHANKAR ALSO AGREES TO RETURN PUTTU‟S PROPERTY. AFTER THE ENGAGEMENT, 
PUTTU DECIDES TO DO A PRE-WEDDING PHOTOSHOOT OF SURESHA AND NETHRA. AND EVERYTHING 
GOES HAYWIRE. AS FATE WOULD HAVE HAD IT, NETHRA ENDS UP DROWNING IN A RIVER AND IS 
WASHED AWAY. SHANKAR BLAMES PUTTU FOR KILLING HIS SISTER. HE DESTROYS PUTTU‟S CAMERA 
AND LOCKS UP HIS STUDIO. PUTTU IS OSTRACISED FROM THE PEOPLE OF HIS TOWN. WHAT FOLLOWS 
IS A SERIES OF REVELATIONS AND A COMEDY OF ERRORS THAT REVEAL WHAT ACTUALLY HAPPENED 
TO NETHRA. WILL PUTTU GET BACK HIS STUDIO FROM SHANKAR HAKKIMANE? WILL THEY FIND OUT 
THE CAUSE OF NETHRA‟S DEATH? WILL SURESHA EVER GET MARRIED? ALL THESE FORM THE CRUX 
OF THE STORY. SHRI BALAJI PHOTO STUDIO IS A FUN-FILLED COMEDIC RIDE THAT EXPLORES THE 
NUANCES OF FRIENDSHIP, RELATIONSHIPS AND FAMILY DYNAMICS AND MUCH MORE. 
“IN PHOTOGRAPHY, THERE IS A REALITY SO SUBTLE THAT IT BECOMES MORE REAL THAN REALITY” .
cast: Raajesh Dhruva, Radhika Achutha Rao, Ravi Salian, Sampath Ram, Ravi Mururu

title: Ama
description: Life that is confined within two walls. That's what she wants to get out of that life. But when she walks out of the way, she's again going through a lot of trouble.

title: Aandaal
description:
Aandaal is a poignant social drama that explores the lives of the Sri Lankan-Tamil community rehabilitated in the forest regions of Gavi and Nelliyampathi, Kerala.

The story delves into the struggles of these displaced people—descendants of laborers taken to Sri Lanka by the British—who were repatriated to India following the 1964 Shastri-Sirimao agreement. Caught between a land they were forced to leave and a homeland that treats them as outsiders, the characters battle a harsh environment and an adverse living system. The film is a raw portrayal of their identity crisis, survival instincts, and the deep-rooted restlessness of souls tethered to a soil that doesn't fully claim them.

title: Aandaal
description: A poignant exploration of Sri Lankan Tamil refugees repatriated to India under the 1964 pact, focusing on their struggle for identity and survival in the forests of Kerala.

title: Jamalinte Punchiri (Jamal's Smile)
description: A heartwarming family suspense thriller centering on Jamal, a gentle man who runs a small food stall. The story follows his stand against social injustice and the dangers that follow when he chooses the side of truth in a society that often favors the wealthy.
cast: Indrans, Ashokan, Jasnya Jayadeesh, Siddique, Prayaga Martin, Joy Mathew, Sona Nair, Midhun Ramesh

title: GOD FREQUENCY
description:
God's Frequency' According to the myths of acoustics, is a frequency which breaks all the norms of all the known and unknown realities. A frequency that levels human to his creator, The God. A frequency which will crack all the mysteries and secrets of this universe. Frequency that let the man travel to any time frame and to any realities.

'Andrè Nicholas Cuban' is celebrated as the demigod of acoustics science. 'God's Frequency' was his concept and this Spanish scientist who lived a century ago inspired lakhs to follow him pursuing this specific frequency. It was never known whether Cuban tuned into 'God's Frequency' or not. Cuban who seemed very accurate and widely considered as an intellectual genius mysteriously disappeared along his family.  After his disappearance many have invested their life into Cuban's concepts hoping to find that right frequency. 
But nobody tuned well enough. As ages passed, Cuban got a cult status but 'God's Frequency' was mocked by modern
science world as Cuban didn't left any reasonable authentication to prove his concept. All that left was some unsolved
equations and some incomprehensible formulas. Even after all the mockery from the scientific society and losses of many
individual's money, time and even life, there is a minority still deeply influenced and believes in Cuban and his God's
frequency.

Amar, Our protagonist is a software professional who's currently possessed with the ideas and works of Cuban. Gradually
slaying his professional career by himself, Amar has invested himself completely into finding out 'God's Frequency'.
Sradha, his wife is partially supporting him as she trusts his capabilities on acoustics. She have seen, heard and
experienced the scale of his talent and knowledge many a times. As time flies Amar's obsession towards frequencies gets
thickened and his focus is rooted into 'God's Frequency' alone. Even when his personal and professional life is falling into
pieces, Amar never gave a hoot about it all. From a point of events Sradha started to react and Amar who has placed
himself on the verge of his invention never gave ear to her complaints. Amar's madly obsession takes a leap and make him
connect to his surroundings through sound alone, the sounds that he seek.
cast:
AARYA BABAR 
PRANALINI BALERIO 
SHALU RAHIM
Niranjan maniyan pillai
Omkar das manikpuri
Pradeep Chowdary

title: Chicken Curry
description: In a suffocating household, emotions and instincts uncontrollably burst, clashing and rumbling against one another and slowly subduing but not completely, leaving a strong undercurrent that is left simmering and turning. Following this bumpy voyage queries set sail in an exploration of the vague boundaries that separate hominids from animals.

title: Lunch Break
description: This short film titled Lunch Break evolves around the everyday life and emotional nuances tied to the simple act of a school lunch break. Through its narrative and visuals, the film explores themes of childhood camaraderie, the brief moments of freedom within a school day, and the little yet meaningful interactions that shape student experiences during break time. The story highlights how a short, shared break becomes richer than just eating, it’s where friendships, laughter, and small life lessons unfold among the characters.
cast:
Sreeja Teacher
Minimol Teacher
Ishitha Shivani
Hridhya S Arun
Thanmaya Sol

title: Buffering
description: Buffering is an award-winning short film created by student filmmaker Thamanna Sol with cinematography by Ann Prabath and editing by Neethish Kichu. The story centers around characters portrayed by Raji and others as their lives intersect with digital delays and moments of hesitation—metaphorically depicted through the idea of “buffering.” The narrative explores how people often pause or freeze in life when faced with emotional, social, or technological interruptions, and how they work to overcome those pauses to move forward. The film uses its title concept (“buffering”) both literally and figuratively to comment on modern communication, relationships, patience, and connection in a tech-saturated world.

title: Heal - Note to self
description: The short film explores the inner journey of a young individual struggling with identity, emotional confusion, and disconnection. Set against the backdrop of natural landscapes, the story uses nature as a mirror to reflect the character’s state of mind. Moments of silence, isolation, and contemplation reveal a person searching for meaning and clarity within themselves.
cast: Ishitha Shivani and Chithra K R

title: The Second Home
description: The Second Home is a docu-fiction a student project that depicts the importance of prioritising mental health among teenagers at school.Especially after the Covid - 19 outbreak where children got isolated.The film focuses on the idea of human ibaraby,where one gotta read each other & care towards fellow beings.This inturn helps the child to progress in their academic and personal life with the access to school's achievements.

title: ISHA-Malayalam Horror
description:
All children can be vulnerable by virtue of their young age and evolving capacities. They can be ‘open to’ harm, injury, violence, and abuse. Due to different circumstances and/or factors children can also be vulnerable to adverse influences and ‘at risk’ behaviour. The damage can also be permanent. The impact can be on the physical, emotional, social, psychological and mental health and well-being of the child.
The Movie, Isha focus on the abuse on kids especially on girls.Isha is a beautiful Tamil girl lives happily in a hill station. Along with the studies her expertise extended to music too. She plays violin.
Martin is a divorcee with two girls. The elder studies in higher secondary and the younger in primary. The senior, Aleena is from Martin’s first wife and she stays in college hostel. Angle lives with her mother and Grandpa in Marvel Estate Bungalow. 
Angle behaves in some weird manner and her mother takes her to a psychologist. He had some suspicions in her conduct and suggested them to meet Munavar Imthiyas, a scholar who do research and experience in Para normal activities and work as a psychic medium too.
Munavar came their residence and he smelt some unnatural vibrations there. But he does exorcism on Angle successfully.
Few days later, Aleena had some unexplainable experiences from her hostel and the warden wanted to contact her father Martin. But they failed to reach him and the authorities contacted Susan and she took her their home. Aleena was not in good harmony with her step mother before. While travelling with Susan the ice went melted.
But Martin got angry when he got to know Aleena was taken to Susan’s house. He rushed to her house and took Aleena to Martin’s bungalow.
Then the story goes for a rollercoaster in the lives of many including Martin, DySP Yogesh, Marimuthu, and Forensic Surgeon Dr.Sunny etc...
Who all are these..?! What is their connection with Aleena...?
Then who is Isha...?! 
Is there any relation between Isha and Aleena....?!
Who is Munavar Imthiyas....?!
What is his role in the life of Martin, Aleena and all...?
The Movie ISHA answers you for all the queries....
ISHA will provide you a never before horror experience in Malayalam Movies. This in an unrealistic film based on real events.
cast: KISHORE SATYA,ABHISHEK VINOD(CASINOVA FAME),MARGRET ANTONY,PRAMOD VELIYANAD,VIJAY MENON ETC..

title: Jami
description: The main character of the movie is a woman who has to be taken care of by her husband and in his absence, her son. With the death of the father, paternal authority functions within the home in the form of the son. The protection extended to the mother by the son working abroad evolves into a surveillance on the life of the single woman. The conflict in the film is also the power struggle between the mother and the son. The struggle against authority leads the middle-class woman to realizations about life.
